About Us

Who We Are

Est. 1998 3 Campuses Anambra State

Christ the Foundation Model Academy was established in 1998 in Okija, Anambra State with a clear vision: to provide quality, Christ-centred secondary education that equips every student with knowledge, discipline, and godly character.

Operating across three campuses — Main Campus at Agbasike Umuohi, Campus 2 at Nkwo Okija, and Campus 3 at Ihiala Main Market — we serve hundreds of students from Junior Secondary School (JSS) through Senior Secondary School (SSS).

We are affiliated with WAEC and NECO, ensuring our students are fully prepared for national and international certification examinations.

✝

Christian Foundation

Our faith-based values guide every aspect of learning, discipline and character development.

📖

Academic Excellence

Rigorous teaching and dedicated staff ensure students achieve top results in WAEC and NECO.

🤝

Community & Discipline

We build responsible, disciplined citizens who contribute positively to Anambra State and Nigeria.

School Principal

School Motto

"Consolidated Knowledge Through Education"

Academics

Academic Programmes

CFMA offers a full secondary education curriculum aligned with the Nigerian National Policy on Education, covering JSS and SSS levels.

Junior Secondary (JSS)

JSS 1 – JSS 3 covering foundation subjects. Students sit the Basic Education Certificate Examination (BECE).

Senior Secondary (SSS)

SS 1 – SS 3 with Science, Commercial and Art streams. Students prepare for WAEC SSCE and NECO.

📚 JSS Subjects Offered

English LanguageMathematics Basic ScienceBasic Technology Social StudiesCivic Education CRS / IRSComputer Studies Agricultural ScienceHome Economics Fine ArtFrench Igbo LanguageBusiness Studies

🎓 SSS Subjects Offered

English LanguageMathematics PhysicsChemistry BiologyEconomics GovernmentAccounting CommerceLiterature in English GeographyCRS Further MathematicsIgbo Language
Examinations

External Examinations

📝

WAEC SSCE

West African Senior School Certificate Examination. Our SS3 students sit for WAEC annually with strong results.

📋

NECO SSCE

National Examinations Council. We register and prepare students for both internal and external NECO.

🎓

JAMB / UTME

We provide dedicated tutorials and mock examinations to prepare SS3 candidates for university entrance.

Early Years & Primary

Nursery & Primary School

Christ the Foundation Model Academy provides a warm, structured, and Christ-centred foundation for children from Creche through Primary 6, nurturing curiosity, confidence and godly character from an early age.

Creche Nursery 1 & 2 Primary 1 – 6 Okija, Anambra

Building Every Child's Foundation for Life

Our Early Years and Primary programme is designed around the Nigerian National Curriculum, with a strong emphasis on literacy, numeracy, moral values, and the development of well-rounded young Nigerians ready for secondary school and beyond.

👶
Creche & Nursery

Ages 6 months – 5 years. Safe, caring and stimulating environment.

📖
Primary 1 – 6

Ages 6 – 12 years. Full Nigerian primary curriculum with Common Entrance preparation.

✝
Faith-Based Learning

Christian values woven into daily lessons, assemblies and school culture.

Ages 0 – 5
🧸

Creche & Nursery

Creche · Nursery 1 · Nursery 2

  • Safe, supervised creche from 6 months
  • Play-based and activity-led learning
  • Early literacy: phonics, letter recognition
  • Early numeracy: counting and shapes
  • Bible stories and morning devotion
  • Music, rhymes and motor skills
  • Qualified, caring nursery teachers
  • Clean, child-safe classrooms
Enrol From 6 Months
Ages 6 – 11
✏️

Primary School

Primary 1 · 2 · 3 · 4 · 5 · 6

  • Full Nigerian Primary Curriculum (NPC)
  • English Language, Mathematics & Igbo
  • Basic Science & Social Studies
  • Computer Studies from Primary 1
  • CRS and Civic Education
  • Common Entrance Examination prep (Pry 6)
  • Regular terminal examinations & reports
  • Dedicated homework & reading period
Common Entrance Preparation
Ages 11+
🎓

Secondary School

JSS 1–3 · SS 1–3

  • Junior Secondary School (JSS 1–3)
  • Senior Secondary School (SS 1–3)
  • Science, Commercial & Arts streams
  • WAEC & NECO registration & preparation
  • JAMB / UTME coaching
  • Well-equipped laboratories
  • Disciplined academic environment
  • Transition from Primary seamless
WAEC · NECO · JAMB

Admissions

How to Apply

We welcome applications from qualified candidates into JSS 1 and SS 1. Admissions are subject to availability and entrance assessment.

1

Obtain Application Form

Visit any campus or submit the form online. Application forms cost ₦2,000 (non-refundable).

2

Entrance Examination

All applicants sit an entrance exam in English and Mathematics at the Main Campus.

3

Submit Documents

PSLE Certificate (for JSS1), previous report cards, birth certificate and 4 passport photographs.

4

Pay School Fees

Upon receiving an offer, complete acceptance and pay the required fees to secure your place.

📌 Fees Guide (Per Term)

JSS 1 – JSS 3Contact School
SS 1 – SS 3Contact School
WAEC / NECO RegistrationSeparate Charge
Application Form₦2,000

Admin Setup

How to Activate Form Submissions

Follow these 3 steps to connect the application form to your Email, Google Sheets and WhatsApp. Each step takes about 5 minutes. You only do this once.

1

📧 Email (EmailJS)

Sends form to cfmsanambra@gmail.com

  1. Go to emailjs.com → Sign up free
  2. Click Add New Service → choose Gmail → connect cfmsanambra@gmail.com
  3. Copy the Service ID (e.g. service_abc123)
  4. Go to Email Templates → Create Template → set "To Email" as cfmsanambra@gmail.com
  5. In the template body, add variables like {{student_name}}, {{phone}}, {{class}}
  6. Copy the Template ID
  7. Go to Account → API Keys → copy your Public Key
  8. Open the website HTML in VS Code → find CONFIG → paste your keys into emailjs_public_key, emailjs_service_id, emailjs_template_id
Free plan: 200 emails/month — plenty for a school admissions form.
2

📊 Google Sheets

All submissions saved in a spreadsheet

  1. Open Google Sheets → create a new sheet called CFMS Applications
  2. Click Extensions → Apps Script
  3. Delete all existing code, then paste the script below
  4. Click Save (💾), then click Deploy → New Deployment
  5. Set type: Web App, Execute as: Me, Who has access: Anyone
  6. Click Deploy → copy the Web App URL
  7. In your website HTML, paste the URL into CONFIG.sheets_url
function doPost(e) { var sheet = SpreadsheetApp .getActiveSpreadsheet() .getActiveSheet(); var data = JSON.parse(e.postData.contents); if (sheet.getLastRow() === 0) { sheet.appendRow(['Ref','Student Name', 'DOB','Gender','Division','Class', 'Campus','Parent','Phone','Email', 'Prev School','Extra','Timestamp']); } sheet.appendRow([data.ref, data.firstname+' '+data.surname, data.dob, data.gender, data.division, data.class, data.campus, data.parent, data.phone, data.email, data.prevschool, data.extra, data.timestamp]); return ContentService .createTextOutput('OK'); }
3

💬 WhatsApp (CallMeBot)

Instant notification on +2348062686710

  1. Open WhatsApp on your phone
  2. Add this number to your contacts: +34 644 63 80 99 (name it "CallMeBot")
  3. Send this exact message to that number:
    "I allow callmebot to send me messages"
  4. Within seconds, CallMeBot will reply with your API Key (a 6-digit number)
  5. Open the website HTML in VS Code → find CONFIG → paste your key into whatsapp_apikey
  6. The phone number is already set to 2348062686710
Free forever. Every application submission will send you a formatted WhatsApp message with all student details instantly.
Sample WhatsApp Message: 📋 NEW CFMS APPLICATION ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 👤 Student: Emeka Okafor 🎂 DOB: 2015-03-12 | Male 📚 Division: primary — Primary 1 🏫 Campus: Main Campus 👨‍👩‍👦 Parent: Mr. John Okafor 📞 Phone: +234 806 268 6710 🕐 Time: 26/04/2025, 10:32am 🔖 Ref: CFMS-APP-482910
⚙️
Where to Find the CONFIG in VS Code

Open CFMS_Final.html in VS Code → Press Ctrl+F (Windows) or Cmd+F (Mac) → Search for const CONFIG → You will see all three sections clearly labelled with comments. Replace each YOUR_..._KEY placeholder with your real key. Save the file. Done!

Teacher Upload Dashboard

Christ the Foundation Model Academy — Results Management

📋 How to Upload Results
  1. Click and open in Microsoft Excel or Google Sheets
  2. Fill columns: Student ID, Student Name, Class, Term, Academic Year, Subject, CA Score, Exam Score
  3. CA Score is out of 40 · Exam Score is out of 60 · Total = 100
  4. Save as .xlsx or .csv and upload below
  5. Results become available to students immediately after upload
